title: nemophila pedunculata f. humifusa
intro: Nemophila pedunculata f. humifusa, also known as baby blue eyes, is a flowering plant in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to Western North America. The medicinal properties of Nemophila pedunculata f. humifusa include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its alkaloid and glycoside content. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Nemophila pedunculata f. humifusa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies for its medicinal properties.
